mapper.insert:
SELECT get_mdl_seq2(#{coId}, 'EML', 6)
INSERT INTO COM_EML_SND ( CO_ID, EML_ID, EML_TO, EML_CC, EML_BCC, EML_SUBJ_VAL, EML_CNTN_VAL, EML_SND_STS_CD, EML_ATCH_ID, EML_SYS_MSG, CRE_USR_ID, CRE_DT, UPD_USR_ID, UPD_DT, EML_FAL_RSN ) VALUES ( #{coId}, #{emlId}, #{emlTo}, #{emlCc}, #{emlBcc}, #{emlSubjVal}, #{emlCntnVal}, #{emlSndStsCd}, #{emlAtchId}, #{emlSysMsg}, #{creUsrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{updUsrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{emlFalRsn} )

INSERT INTO COM_EML_ATCH ( CO_ID, EML_ATCH_ID, FILE_ID, DSP_ORD_VAL, CRE_USR_ID, CRE_DT, UPD_USR_ID, UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{coId}, #{emlAtchId}, #{fileId}, #{dspOrdVal}, #{creUsrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{updUsrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE COM_EML_SND SET EML_SND_STS_CD = #{emlSndStsCd}, EML_SYS_MSG = #{emlSysMsg}, EML_FAL_RSN = #{emlFalRsn}, UPD_USR_ID = #{updUsrId}, UPD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND EML_ID = #{emlId}
mapper.select: SELECT EML_ID, EML_TO, EML_CC, EML_BCC, EML_SUBJ_VAL, EML_CNTN_VAL, EML_SND_STS_CD, EML_SYS_MSG, EML_ATCH_ID, CRE_USR_ID, TO_CHAR(CRE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CRE_DT FROM COM_EML_SND WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND EML_ID = #{emlId}

SELECT a.EML_ATCH_ID, a.FILE_ID, f.FILE_NM, f.FILE_TP, f.FILE_SZ, a.DSP_ORD_VAL FROM COM_EML_ATCH a JOIN COM_FILE f ON f.CO_ID = a.CO_ID AND f.FILE_ID = a.FILE_ID WHERE a.CO_ID = #{coId} AND a.EML_ATCH_ID = #{emlAtchId} ORDER BY a.DSP_ORD_VAL
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO COM_EML_SND ( CO_ID, EML_ID, EML_TO, EML_CC, EML_BCC, EML_SUBJ_VAL, EML_CNTN_VAL, EML_SND_STS_CD, EML_SYS_MSG, CRE_USR_ID, CRE_DT, UPD_USR_ID, UPD_DT, EML_FAL_RSN ) VALUES
( #{e.coId}, get_mdl_seq2(#{e.coId}, 'EML', 6), #{e.emlTo}, #{e.emlCc}, #{e.emlBcc}, #{e.emlSubjVal}, #{e.emlCntnVal}, #{e.emlSndStsCd}, #{e.emlSysMsg}, #{e.creUsrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{e.updUsrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{e.emlFalRsn} )
mapper.select: WITH locked AS ( SELECT EML_ID FROM COM_EML_SND WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND EML_SND_STS_CD = 'QUEUED' AND EML_SYS_MSG LIKE #{sysMsgPrefix} || '%' ORDER BY CRE_DT LIMIT #{batchSize} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED ) UPDATE COM_EML_SND e SET EML_SND_STS_CD = 'PROCESSING', UPD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM locked WHERE e.CO_ID = #{coId} AND e.EML_ID = locked.EML_ID RETURNING e.EML_ID AS emlId, e.EML_TO AS emlTo, e.EML_SUBJ_VAL AS emlSubjVal, e.EML_CNTN_VAL AS emlCntnVal, e.EML_SYS_MSG AS emlSysMsg, e.CRE_USR_ID AS creUsrId, e.UPD_USR_ID AS updUsrId, e.CO_ID AS coId
mapper.update: UPDATE COM_EML_SND SET EML_SND_STS_CD = 'QUEUED', EML_SYS_MSG = EML_SYS_MSG, UPD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND EML_SND_STS_CD = 'PROCESSING' AND EML_SYS_MSG LIKE #{sysMsgPrefix} || '%' AND UPD_DT < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - (#{staleMinutes} || ' minutes')::INTERVAL
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT CO_ID FROM COM_EML_SND WHERE EML_SYS_MSG LIKE #{sysMsgPrefix} || '%' AND ( EML_SND_STS_CD = 'QUEUED' OR ( EML_SND_STS_CD = 'PROCESSING' AND UPD_DT < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - (#{staleMinutes} || ' minutes')::INTERVAL ) )
